pr_title: HTTP/3: Add trailers and reset features
pr_body:
Fixes https://github.com/dotnet/aspnetcore/issues/28335
Fixes https://github.com/dotnet/aspnetcore/issues/28334

Add support for trailing headers and error code.

Actual changes are in https://github.com/dotnet/aspnetcore/commit/777b07aee1b30043893529b051a9ebd52ae89020
